RECIPE: Gingerbread Christmas Tree Biscuits by @thegroovyfoodcompanyтБа
таАтБатБгтБгтаАтБа
Makes: 25тБа
Prep Time: 40 minutesтБа
Cook Time: 10 minutesтБа
таАтБатБгтБгтаАтБа
Ingredients-тБа
тАв 100g The Groovy Food Company organic virgin coconut oil, melted and cooledтБа
тАв 85g The Groovy Food Company organic virgin coconut sugarтБа
тАв 100g The Groovy Food Company Rich & Dark agave nectarтБа
тАв 2 tsp vanilla extractтБа
тАв 1 eggтБа
тАв 350g plain flour, plus extra for dustingтБа
тАв 1 tsp bicarbonate of sodaтБа
тАв 1 tbsp ground gingerтБа
тАв 1 tsp ground cinnamonтБа
тАв Icing sugar for dustingтБа
таАтБатБгтБгтаАтБа
Method-тБа
1. Beat the coconut oil, coconut sugar, agave, vanilla and egg together in a bowl with electric beaters for 4 mins, until thickened and pale.тБа
2. Add the flour, bicarb and spices, and beat until just combined. Cover and chill for 30 mins, or until firm.тБа
3. Heat oven to 180C/160C fan/gas 4. Shape the dough into two discs, and return one to the fridge. Place a large sheet of baking parchment on your work surface and dust with flour, top with a disc of dough and dust that with flour too. Cover with another sheet of parchment and roll out the dough to the thickness of a ┬г1 coin. Using Christmas Tree cutters preferably, cut out the biscuits, re-rolling any leftover dough.тБа
4. Transfer to parchment-lined trays and bake in batches for 8 mins, until golden brown - if you like them extra crunchy bake for 10 mins. Cool on a wire rack and repeat with the remaining dough. Once cool dust with icing sugar before serving, or enjoy as they are.тБа
таАтБатБгтБгтаАтБа

RECIPE: Avocado Tiramisu ЁЯеС by @avocadofruitoflifeтБа
таАтБатБгтБгтаАтБа
Tiramisu is a timeless dessert in its traditional form but have you ever thought about making it with avocado? The texture is delightfully creamy and combines with the classic coffee kick perfectly.тБа
таАтБатБгтБгтаАтБа
INGREDIENTS:тБа
For the avocado cream: тБа
1 avocadoтБа
Juice and zest of 1тБД2 lemonтБа
1 tsp. vanilla extractтБа
35g caster sugar тБа
25g coconut oil, melted тБа
150g coconut yoghurtтБа
For the biscuit layer: тБа
120g digestive biscuitsтБа
50ml espresso coffee, coldтБа
15g cacao nibsтБа
Cacao powderтБа
таАтБатБгтБгтаАтБа
METHOD:тБа
Combine all ingredients for the avocado cream together in a food processor until thoroughly mixed and it resembles a cream-like texture. Let it set in the fridge for ┬▒30 minutes.тБа
To make the biscuit layer, crush the biscuits into 1cm pieces. Mix them well in a bowl with the espresso and cacao nibs.тБа
Assemble the tiramisu in 4 small bowls or glasses by alternating layers of biscuit and cream. Finish by sprinkling the top with cacao powder, using a small sieve.тБа

This veggie-based bread alternative by @wellnourished_nutrition is the perfect combo of crunch, softness and dunking soup indulgence ЁЯдЧ itтАЩs been tried, tested and amended & H&H nutrition contributor, El has finally hit the perfect texture for this one ЁЯСМЁЯП╝тБа
таАтБатБгтБгтаАтБа
METHOD:тБа
тАв Line a baking tray or loaf tin with baking paper & preheat your oven at 180 degreesтБа
тАв In a food processor or blender, blitz a whole head of broccoli (and stalk) or 3 handfuls of kale to create a rice consistencyтБа
тАв Once blitzed, crack 3 organic eggs and add to the blender alongside 50g ground almonds, a pinch of Himalayan sea salt, 1/2 teaspoon of baking powder, 1 teaspoon psyllium husk and optional nutritional yeast to make it cheesy тАУ blendЁЯХ║ЁЯП╗тБа
тАв Once combined, decant onto your tray or loaf tin and sprinkle with your choice of seeds too!тБа
тАв Bake in the oven for 25-30 minutes. Leave to cool and enjoy fresh, or freeze for when you next enjoy a warming soup ЁЯНЬтБа

lifestyle

We're all about integrating healthy living seamlessly into our daily routine. Living a healthy lifestyle goes far beyond the food we eat and the workouts we do. We want to keep you motivated to live life consciously and happily through inspiring interviews, self-care talk, sustainability tips, career advice and much more.

Showcasing the best healthy living advice that will leave you bursting with energy. Our wellness section will provide you with expert tools to help you on your way to live your healthiest life. From how to get glowing skin to where to finding the best green juice тАУ we have you covered!

A NOTE FROM THE EDITOR
Hi, IтАЩm Sadie, the founder of Hip & Healthy. We would love it if you subscribed to our newsletter: a weekly dose of health and wellness inspo delivered to your inbox. Plus be the first to hear about competitions, offers and events. Not to mention we also send new subscribers a copy of our healthy recipe book.

Look forward to connecting with you soon, Sadie x
